package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	redis "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

// scenario for redis_connection_per_request: `redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{...})` inside handler/request functions
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario423Positive(ctx context.Context, client *redis.Client, key string) error {
	if err := client.Get(ctx, key).Err(); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return client.Set(ctx, key, "value", 0).Err()
}
